text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? I'm hungry, so I'm eating. Duh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you want me to eat a "real<n>meal" or
whatever, but supplements and<n>cereal just get the
job done more<n>efficiently.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As long as I get my nutrients, it doesn't<n>matter
what I eat. I mean, if it tastes<n>good then cool, but
that's not what<n>matters most to—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Forget it. I yapped too much... Tch.
